description: Porsche's stake in Bugatti and Rimac Group have been sold to private equity.

title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
description: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.

title: Health-care AI is here. We don’t know if it actually helps patients.
description: I don’t need to tell you that AI is everywhere. Or that it is being used, increasingly, in hospitals. Doctors are using AI to help them with notetaking. description: As people increasingly rely on AI chatbots for guidance, even on financial matters, a healthy dose of skepticism is critical.
